dataQuality.summary: Strategy spec generated from complete CMC market context, Four.Meme discovery, and curated CMC on-chain skill enrichment inputs.

universe.selectionMethod: Apply a CMC regime gate first, then scan live Four.Meme meme-api feeds and reuse the distilled 4alpha discovery buckets (Safe 2 Ape, Medium Risk, Gem Hunt) to shortlist contract-level candidates.

regime.label: risk-on-bnb-meme-rotation
regime.summary: Broad market conditions are supportive, BNB is showing strength, and BTC dominance is not crowding out alt rotation.

entryRules.description: Only scan Four.Meme candidates when total crypto market cap is flat-to-up versus the prior 24h snapshot.
Only activate the strategy when CMC Fear and Greed is above the defensive floor.
Require BNB to hold non-negative 24h momentum before taking Four.Meme continuation setups.
Require BNB to maintain at least modest 7d strength to justify BNB-native meme rotation exposure.
Avoid fresh meme exposure when BTC dominance is accelerating too hard against alt rotation.
Only allow candidates that land in the approved Four.Meme discovery buckets for the current market regime.
entryRules.notes: Safe 2 Ape handles launch-phase continuation; Gem Hunt handles post-migration continuation. Medium Risk stays watchlist-only in this slice.

entryRules.description: Match the allowed launch stage to the selected discovery buckets.
Ignore listings that are too new for spread and identity noise to settle.
Focus on the first day of activity so the setup remains a launch-phase strategy rather than a general momentum chase.
Require non-trivial venue activity from the Four.Meme discovery scan before entry.
Require launch-phase candidates to show meaningful bonding progress before entry so the setup is not just the first few minutes of noise.
Use CMC MCP BNB RSI as an advisory overheat filter before activating Four.Meme continuation exposure.
Reject Four.Meme candidates whose CMC on-chain holder-concentration skill reports high or critical concentration risk.
Require shortlisted contracts to show organic or improving DEX wallet activity before entry.
entryRules.notes: A warning keeps the candidate eligible only with reduced position sizing if the holder-concentration gate still passes.

exitRules.description: Exit the position when drawdown from entry reaches the hard stop threshold.
Lock in strength once the continuation move reaches the defined take-profit target.
Exit if the trade has not resolved within one day of launch-phase momentum.
Flatten open exposure if the market regime gate flips risk-off after entry.

riskControls.description: Cap each position at 0.5% of strategy equity.
Cap concurrent Four.Meme exposure at 1.5% of strategy equity.
Stop taking fresh entries after 1.0% daily strategy drawdown.
Skip candidates that do not survive the live Four.Meme discovery bucket scan, even if the broader market regime is supportive.
Wait two hours after a stop-out before re-entering any Four.Meme candidate.
Scale Four.Meme position size down using the weakest on-chain multiplier among candidates that remain eligible after hard gates.
Treat DEX wallet PnL review as confidence context only; never use wallet PnL alone as a buy trigger.

invalidation.description: Invalidate the setup if Fear and Greed drops back below the strategy floor.
Invalidate the setup if total crypto market cap turns negative again on a 24h basis.
Invalidate the setup if BNB loses its 7d strength bias.
Invalidate a shortlisted Four.Meme candidate if later CMC on-chain skill replay marks holder concentration as high or critical.

assumptions.description: CMC market metrics are treated as the authoritative snapshot for regime gating at hourly granularity.
assumptions.impact: Backtests should sample the same hourly snapshot cadence rather than tick-level data.

assumptions.description: Four.Meme candidates are evaluated by chain and contract address, not by symbol alone.
assumptions.impact: Backtests must join venue data on contract identity to avoid ticker collisions.

assumptions.description: The liquidity floor is intended to keep slippage assumptions within a small-cap but still testable range.
assumptions.impact: Backtests should model slippage and fees explicitly instead of assuming perfect fills.

assumptions.description: Curated CMC Skills Marketplace on-chain enrichments are applied only after Four.Meme has produced a contract-level shortlist.
assumptions.impact: Backtests should treat holder concentration and DEX wallet activity as timestamped candidate filters, while wallet PnL remains advisory and never proves profitability.

assumptions.description: The strategy spec is reviewed by a distilled 4alpha global learning policy before validation.
assumptions.impact: Backtests should treat the brain review verdict as an activation gate, not as an execution instruction.

assumptions.description: The Four.Meme skill applies a smart-wallet entry doctrine distilled from 4alpha custom skill research as an advisory review policy.
assumptions.impact: Backtests may use currently available market-cap, volume, holder, bonding, bucket, and attached on-chain enrichment fields immediately; deeper smart-wallet cluster or short-window buy/sell flow should remain explicit future evidence when no adapter snapshot is attached.

evidence.summary: Total crypto market cap is 3480000000000 USD with a 24h change of 1.25%. BTC dominance is 53.40% with a 24h change of -0.12%.
Fear and Greed is 64 and classified as Greed.
BNB trades at 652.40 USD with 1.18% 24h change and 4.70% 7d change.

Scanned Four.Meme feeds via meme-api with counts new=1, volume=2, hot=2, dex=1. Bucket counts are safe2ape=1, mediumRisk=1, gemHunt=1. Leading names: FOUR/Four Meme Signal (0x0a43fc31a73013089df59194872ecae4cae14444) bucket safe2ape, feeds newLaunches+volumeLeaders+hot, MC $92.00K, Vol $186.00K; WATCH/Watchlist Only (0x5f0e1d2c3b4a69788766554433221100aabbccdd) bucket mediumRisk, feeds hot, MC $52.00K, Vol $210.00K; BNBMAX/BNB Max Rotation (0x7a1b9c2d3e4f5061728394a5b6c7d8e9f0012345) bucket gemHunt, feeds dexMigrated+volumeLeaders, MC $420.00K, Vol $620.00K.
CMC MCP technical-analysis tool returned BNB indicators: Fixture BNB TA: RSI 58.4, MACD histogram positive, price above EMA20 and EMA50..

Applied curated on-chain skill outputs after Four.Meme shortlist: holder concentration as a hard risk gate, DEX wallet activity as entry quality, and wallet PnL as advisory confidence only. Candidates: FOUR 0x0a43fc31a73013089df59194872ecae4cae14444 risk=low eligible=true size=1 reviews=score_holder_concentration_risk:passed/review_dex_wallet_activity_profile:passed/review_dex_wallet_pnl:passed; WATCH 0x5f0e1d2c3b4a69788766554433221100aabbccdd risk=high eligible=false size=0 reviews=score_holder_concentration_risk:failed/review_dex_wallet_activity_profile:warning/review_dex_wallet_pnl:warning; BNBMAX 0x7a1b9c2d3e4f5061728394a5b6c7d8e9f0012345 risk=medium eligible=true size=0.75 reviews=score_holder_concentration_risk:warning/review_dex_wallet_activity_profile:passed/review_dex_wallet_pnl:passed.
Applied 12 learned lesson(s) through multi-agent review.
Applied advisory setup modes, smart-wallet confirmation requirements, 5-of-8 entry checklist, and avoid rules as strategy-spec review policy.

strategyThesis: Use CMC market regime as the first gate, then only promote contract-level Four.Meme candidates that survive the approved discovery bucket rules. Current BNB 7d strength is 4.70%, Fear and Greed is 64, and the venue scan produced safe2ape=1, mediumRisk=1, gemHunt=1. The multi-agent brain approved activation because 2 sampled candidate(s) match the approved bucket gate, the final review preserved explicit risk controls, and the smart-wallet doctrine is represented as evidence requirements rather than execution permission.

brainReview.strategyThesis: Use CMC market regime as the first gate, then only promote contract-level Four.Meme candidates that survive the approved discovery bucket rules. Current BNB 7d strength is 4.70%, Fear and Greed is 64, and the venue scan produced safe2ape=1, mediumRisk=1, gemHunt=1. The multi-agent brain approved activation because 2 sampled candidate(s) match the approved bucket gate, the final review preserved explicit risk controls, and the smart-wallet doctrine is represented as evidence requirements rather than execution permission.

learning.summary: Never approve a meme-token setup by symbol alone. Contract address, venue, chain, and timestamp must be preserved. Recent clusters of failed entries should create a temporary cooldown instead of repeated re-entry. Medium Risk discovery names are useful watchlist material, but they should not become active entries without a supportive regime and confirmation. Missing social/KOL data is neutral, not bearish. Explicit bearish social evidence, wash-trading evidence, or suspicious fresh-wallet behavior should block. Smart-wallet doctrine applied 8 advisory rule(s): smart-wallet:contract-address-grouping, smart-wallet:hard-gates-override-doctrine, smart-wallet:avoid-dead-liquidity, smart-wallet:confirmation-levels, smart-wallet:missing-wallet-flow-is-future-evidence, smart-wallet:setup-mode:confirmed-momentum, smart-wallet:setup-mode:mature-narrative, smart-wallet:entry-checklist-5-of-8.

agents.summary: Safety approved the spec for downstream review with strict size, invalidation controls, and smart-wallet doctrine evidence boundaries.
reasons: Contract-level identity is present for sampled candidates.
The strategy includes explicit stop, exposure, cooldown, and invalidation controls.
The CMC regime gate remains visible before venue selection.
Smart-wallet doctrine is advisory only and cannot bypass hard safety gates.

agents.summary: Social review approved using Four.Meme feed presence as a weak venue-attention proxy while preserving smart-wallet cluster requirements as future evidence.
reasons: 3 selected candidate(s) appeared in hot, volume, or DEX-migrated feeds.
No external KOL or wallet-social feed is claimed in this repo slice.
Missing social data is treated as neutral according to the global learning policy.
Smart-wallet cluster confirmation is required as future evidence before converting watchlist names into active entries.

agents.summary: Gatekeeper approved the strategy spec for backtesting and paper evaluation.
reasons: 2 sampled candidate(s) match the currently approved entry bucket.
Safety and Social reviews both approved downstream review.
The smart-wallet doctrine is represented as evidence requirements, not as execution permission.
The strategy remains a spec output, not an execution command.

rationale: CMC conditions support deploying the Four.Meme launch-phase strategy. The current CMC snapshot shows Fear and Greed at 64, total market cap change at 1.25% over 24h, and BNB at 4.70% over 7d. The venue scan is no longer hypothetical: the current Four.Meme discovery snapshot produced 3 featured candidates across Safe 2 Ape (1), Medium Risk (1), and Gem Hunt (1), with FOUR/Four Meme Signal (safe2ape), WATCH/Watchlist Only (mediumRisk), BNBMAX/BNB Max Rotation (gemHunt) as the leading names. CMC Skills Marketplace on-chain enrichment reviewed shortlisted contracts with holder concentration, DEX wallet activity, and wallet PnL signals; PnL is treated as advisory only. Brain review: Gatekeeper approved the strategy spec for backtesting and paper evaluation.

Wallet PnL is supportive but used only as advisory confidence, not as a buy trigger.
